sources.name: BLS Public Data API
notes: Version 1 is public and does not require registration.
Version 2 requires registration and supports richer/higher-volume access.
Timeseries API supports GET for single series and POST for multi-series or parameterized requests.

sources.name: Census Data API User Guide
notes: Current Census data queries require an API key.
Queries use dataset vintages and geography predicates.
API output is compact JSON unless another output format is requested.

sources.name: BEA API
notes: BEA API requests require a registered UserID.
The API exposes metadata methods and GetData over datasets such as Regional, NIPA, and GDPbyIndustry.
